content:
# Arabian Shield Geology

**Summary**: A major geological province in the Arabian Peninsula containing significant mineral deposits.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2024-al-hakimi|Al-Hakimi, 2024]] studied granitoids within the Arabian Shield to understand its tectonic evolution.

## Geological and Structural Setting

- [[2024-al-hakimi|Al-Hakimi, 2024]] Accretionary belt of the Arabian-Nubian Shield

## Formations Present

- [[2024-al-hakimi|Al-Hakimi, 2024]] Midyan, Muwaylih, Ifal, Atiyah, Haql

## Key Findings From This Location

- The Arabian Shield contains one of the largest alkaline granitoid fields on Earth. ([[2024-al-hakimi|Al-Hakimi, 2024, p. 32]])
